one_time_description: Boundary settlement revenue of $132,801,621 recognized, with corresponding Trust Settlement expense of $127,372,330
economic_notes: First Nation has mining and mineral agreements with local companies including Vale Canada Limited, KGHM International, and Glencore. Business enterprise operations reported. Ontario Power Generation settlement reserve of $1,559,657 held.
notes: Dominant one-time item: boundary settlement revenue of $132,801,621 with corresponding Trust Settlement expense of $127,372,330, resulting in net $5.4M impact on surplus. Without these items, operations would have been near breakeven. Total government transfers calculated as Provincial ($656,973) + Federal ISC ($5,253,239) + CMHC ($150,104) + Anishnawbek Nation ($1,508,442) + KEB ($2,391,191) + Union of Ontario Indians ($658,511) + other applicable transfers. OSR includes boundary settlement, mining agreements, business enterprise, OFNLP, and other non-government revenues. No schedule of remuneration provided. Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 but document header says 2023 — fiscal_year set to 2023.
